mainEntity.name: Does AEO best practices matter for businesses in Los Angeles or Austin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, AEO can help local businesses if people search for services, providers, or software with location-specific intent. For teams in places like Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, and Salt Lake City, local proof such as nearby case studies, city pages, or region-specific testimonials can make your answers more relevant.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. AEO matters in local markets when searchers want a nearby solution or region-specific proof. Location pages, local testimonials, and clear service descriptions can improve relevance in cities like Los Angeles and Austin.
